name: Inference
description: Turn any computer or edge device into a command center for your computer vision projects.

name: Lance
description: Modern columnar data format for ML implemented in Rust.

name: Kurtosis
description: A build, packaging, and run system for ephemeral multi-container environments.

name: Hyperband
description: open source code for tuning hyperparams with Hyperband.

name: Inkog
description: Open-source AI agent security scanner. Detects prompt injection, infinite loops, token bombing, SQL injection via LLM, and missing human oversight across 20+ frameworks. CLI + MCP server with compliance mapping to EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and OWASP LLM Top 10.

name: Roundtable
description: Zero-configuration unified AI assistant management built on the FastMCP framework. Provides seamless integration with Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI assistants through a single MCP interface with session management, logging, and production-ready operations.

name: LeRobot
description: A central community library by Hugging Face for AI in robotics — end-to-end learning tools, data pipelines, and support for training/deploying VLA models.

name: PromptLayer
description: PromptLayer is a platform that allows you to track, manage, and share your GPT prompt engineering by acting as middleware to log all OpenAI API requests.

name: Vidur
description: A large-scale simulation framework for LLM inference

name: Weaviate
description: Weaviate is an open source vector search engine that stores both objects and vectors, allowing for combining vector search with structured filtering with the fault-tolerance and scalability of a cloud-native database, all accessible through GraphQL, REST, and various language clients.

name: KAOS
description: KAOS is a Kubernetes-native framework for deploying and orchestrating AI agents with tool access, multi-agent coordination, and seamless LLM integration.

name: FATE
description: An Industrial Grade Federated Learning Framework

name: Hopsworks
description: Hopsworks is a MLOps platform for training and operating large and small ML systems, including fine-tuning and serving LLMs. Hopsworks includes both a feature store and vector database for RAG.

name: AutoGluon
description: AutoML for Image, Text, and Tabular Data.

name: Agentic Radar
description: Agentic Radar is a security scanner for LLM agentic workflows for potential vulnerabilities.

name: AgentLab
description: AgentLab is an open-source framework for developing, testing, and benchmarking web agents on diverse tasks, designed for scalability and reproducibility.

name: SmolVLA
description: A compact ~450M parameter VLA by Hugging Face, designed to be computationally efficient and accessible, running on consumer GPUs or CPUs. Part of the LeRobot ecosystem.

name: PromptIDE
description: PromptIDE by xAI is an integrated development environment for prompt engineering and interpretability research, providing transparent access to Grok-1 with rich analytics and Python SDK support.

name: langchain-serve
description: Serverless LLM apps on Production with Jina AI Cloud (Archived)

name: Chroma
description: the open source embedding database
